aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited structured data and conversational content gaps, despite having a solid foundation in local SEO.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common HVAC questions and answers.
Expand content to include HowTo guides for common HVAC issues.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not optimized or visible, severely limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: GBP is not found, making the business invisible to Google AI.
Missing photos, posts, and Q&A to engage potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Focus on acquiring more high-quality citations from local directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Dallas, TX.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and expanding content to include common HVAC questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as HVAC experts by creating detailed HowTo guides and showcasing certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The business is not visible on Google Business Profile, and structured data is minimal.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, GBP optimization, and conversational content to make your business the top choice for AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing market share.

cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business AI-ready and capture more leads.
